# Retrospective graduations reader: discussion-marker detection joins the coverage label

## Context

The last fact class of the retrospective enrichment family (split from #14721 at PR time — the other five classes are live). Graduations are recorded as Discussion closures carrying the graduation-marker comment vocabulary; `gh search` does not cover Discussions, so this reader needs a bounded discussions GraphQL query (recently-closed discussions, marker detection in the closing comments).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A bounded reader returning `{ref, headline, at}` facts for graduations within the window.
- [ ] Slots into the compositional coverage label with ONE array entry (the call-site's `coveredClasses` design — a failing reader drops exactly its class).
- [ ] Integration test extension: graduation facts counted + rendered from the written handoff; firewall re-asserted.

## Related

#14721 (the enrichment family — five classes live at its close) · #14603/#14706 (render + assembler contracts, merged).

Claimable — bounded single-reader; the compositional label makes it a one-array-entry slot-in.
